assignments.title: SQL Basics
assignments.description: Intro to SELECT queries on the Employees table.

questions.questionText: Get employee first and last names

assignments.title: Filtering & Sorting
assignments.description: Practice WHERE, ORDER BY, and LIMIT clauses.

questions.questionText: Get employees with salary greater than 80000

questions.answer: SELECT * FROM Employees ORDER BY salary DESC LIMIT 5;

assignments.title: Joins & Aggregations
assignments.description: Advanced queries joining Employees and Departments.

questions.questionText: Get each employee with their department name
questions.answer: SELECT e.firstname, e.lastname, d.departmentName FROM Employees e INNER JOIN Departments d ON e.departmentId = d.departmentId;
SELECT d.departmentName, AVG(e.salary) AS avg_salary FROM Employees e JOIN Departments d ON e.departmentId = d.departmentId GROUP BY d.departmentName;

questions.questionText: Get the highest paid employee in each department
questions.answer: SELECT d.departmentName, e.firstname, e.lastname, e.salary FROM Employees e JOIN Departments d ON e.departmentId = d.departmentId WHERE e.salary = (SELECT MAX(salary) FROM Employees WHERE departmentId = e.departmentId);
